text:
Once upon an apocalyptic afternoon, a wise old owl perched on a branch outside the cozy nest she called home. She noticed something peculiar—a shadowy figure sneaking through her garden. It scouted stealthily, then vanished just as she watched.

Over lunch, Ophelia, the owl, mulled over her daytime stalker. She decided to look into it on the internet. That night, she scanned owl eyes on wildlife cams.

The mysterious visitor was just a young squirrel who enjoyed collecting shiny things. He hadn't intended harm; just an odd obsession!

So, Ophelia didn't want to worry folks. She taught him the joys of collecting stones that had flecks of shiny metal.

The squirrel learned a lot from Ophelia—except flying. She showed him how to soar gracefully on nimble wings.

After years of friendship, the squirrel would visit Ophelia...with a collection of stones.
